Interface SlimeWorldAdapter

All Known Implementing Classes:
AsPaperSWMAdapter, SourbyCraftSWMAdapter
public interface SlimeWorldAdapter
Common interface for SlimeWorldManager adapters. Implementations bridge between Star and specific SWM implementations (AdvancedSlimePaper, SourbyCraft, etc.).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    deleteWorld(String worldName)
    Deletes a world by name.
    String
    getName()
    Returns the name of this adapter (e.g., "aspaper", "sourbycraft").
    default int
    getPriority()
    Returns the priority of this adapter.
    boolean
    isAvailable()
    Checks if this adapter is available on the current server.
    @Nullable Object
    loadWorld(String worldName, boolean readOnly)
    Loads a slime world by name.
    void
    saveWorld(Object worldInstance)
    Saves a slime world.
    boolean
    worldExists(String worldName)
    Checks if a world with the given name exists.

  • Method Details

    • getName

      String getName()
      Returns the name of this adapter (e.g., "aspaper", "sourbycraft").

    • isAvailable

      boolean isAvailable()
      Checks if this adapter is available on the current server. Implementation should check for the presence of required classes.

    • getPriority

      default int getPriority()
      Returns the priority of this adapter. Higher priority adapters are preferred when multiple are available.

    • loadWorld

      @Nullable @Nullable Object loadWorld(String worldName, boolean readOnly) throws Exception
      Loads a slime world by name.
      Parameters:
      worldName - the name of the world to load
      readOnly - whether the world should be loaded in read-only mode
      Returns:
      a SlimeWorldInstance if loading succeeded, null otherwise
      Throws:
      Exception - if world loading fails

    • saveWorld

      void saveWorld(Object worldInstance) throws Exception
      Saves a slime world.
      Parameters:
      worldInstance - the world instance to save
      Throws:
      Exception - if saving fails

    • worldExists

      boolean worldExists(String worldName)
      Checks if a world with the given name exists.

    • deleteWorld

      void deleteWorld(String worldName) throws Exception
      Deletes a world by name.
      Throws:
      Exception
